name: Kinich
description:
First time ever making a bot so bear with me.

Basically the only reason i made this bot was because i was bored and because i was tired searching through bots to find a Kinich bot that i liked (so its mainly for me)

In short, you moved to Natlan when you were 8 after your family parents died and due to your father's relation to Mavuika. Thats when you met Kinich and you and Kinich have been basically inseparable ever since.

If yall want different natlanese characters i can try if this gets popular enough (doubt it will 😭)

also remember this is my first bot so remember constructive criticism is quite appreciated
creator: Mithra_4
